violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of sauce cups were stored on the floor under the front counter.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wiping cloth was stored on the shelf under the crazy bread station.

Time as a public health control. — --Food was not marked or identified with the time within which it must be cooked, served, or discarded. Made uncooked cheese and pepperoni pizzas in the prep area by the pizza making machine temped between 60 and 71 degrees. These must must be marked with the time they were made, or need to be cooked by. These must be cooked within four hours of making.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Red tape was placed over holes in the walk in cooler door.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The upper and lower shelves in the walk in cooler on the South side need to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Outside of mixers and white dough machine in the dough area need to be cleaned. The outside of the white freezer, storage shelves by the prep sink, racks by the pizza prep cooler, and fans in the kitchen need to be cleaned.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation. Sanitizer for the sink dispenser was not hooked up and no sanitizer for washing dishes was on site at the time of inspection. Only had on spray bottle of sanitizer in the bathroom.--Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. Sanitizer for three compartment sink tested at 0 ppm for quat or chlorine. No sanitizer was hooked up for the dispenser.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Paper plates on the shelf on front counter were not inverted.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. A lid was placed over the hand sink to hold up containers for making dough.--Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Employee was using hand sink to fill containers of water to make dough.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. The paper towel dispenser was not working and paper towels were placed on the food storage rack, and not self dispensing.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in the dough making area need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken wall tile and baseboard by the desk. Broken floor tile by the three compartment and mop sink.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The hood system over the ovens needs to be cleaned. The back of the hood system needs to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. A box of paper plates was stored on the floor under the front counter.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. The door closer to the restroom by the dish area was broken, and would not close the door.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken floor tile by the walk in cooler door, behind the mixer, by the mop sink, and dish area. Broken wall tile by the door to the kitchen.
